response.step_by_step_log: The on-screen text at the beginning of the video showed "渡月橋～君想ふ～" and credited Mai Kuraki (lyrics) and Akihito Tokunaga (composition). I searched for "渡月橋 ～君 想ふ～ 倉木麻衣 lyrics japanese and english" to get the lyrics. The performer is Ayame Nakiri. The video consists of a single song performance followed by a speaking segment.
response.global_summary: A virtual YouTuber (VTuber) performs a cover of the song "Togetsukyou ~Kimi Omou~" in a themed, Japanese-inspired stage setting. The video focuses on the character performing the song throughout.

scenes.description: The character begins singing as on-screen text displays the song title and credits. The character continues singing throughout the scene.

scenes.description: The music ends, and the performer speaks to the audience, mentioning the guest and her new microphone.
